explanation:
Personal finance and investing use universal mathematical principles (compound interest, time value of money, risk-return optimization). This calculator applies standard industry finance formulas.

## How it works

CFT: the total finance cost of a personal loan (APR + VAT + fees).

This calculator applies the formula with your input values, checking typical ranges and alerting you to unusual amounts.

## Typical benchmarks by term

| Term | S&P 500 | 10-Year Bonds | Cash |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 year | Highly variable | 4–5% | 3–5% |
| 5 years | ~8% avg | ~4% | Inflation |
| 10 years | ~9–10% | ~4% | <Inflation |
| 20+ years | ~10% nominal | ~5% | N/A |

## Investment principles

- **Stick to the plan** during crises. Emotion is the worst advisor.
- **Diversify**: don't concentrate in a single asset, sector, or country.
- **Keep costs low**: expense ratios >1% annually eat 30% of returns over 30 years.
- **Long time horizon**: stocks work over 10+ years, not 1 year.
- **Rebalance**: once yearly, not more.

## Final notes

This calculation is for reference only. For critical decisions (financial, medical, legal), consult a specialized professional. Values are current for 2026 and reviewed regularly.

faq.q: What does CFT mean on a personal loan?
faq.a: CFT is the total finance cost—it includes the APR, VAT on interest (21%), and all fees. It's what you actually pay.

faq.q: What's the difference between APR and CFT?
faq.a: APR is just the interest rate. CFT adds VAT on interest, origination fees, and insurance—showing the real total cost.

faq.q: Is a lower CFT always better?
faq.a: Yes, CFT is your actual cost. A lower CFT means a better loan deal.

faq.q: Can I pay off a personal loan early?
faq.a: Most allow early repayment, usually with a prepayment fee. Review your loan agreement for specifics.

faq.q: Is life insurance required on personal loans?
faq.a: Life insurance is typically mandatory. Unemployment insurance is usually optional. Confirm with your lender.

faq.q: How are government personal loans different?
faq.a: Government programs often offer subsidized APRs. Check with government banks or ANSES for eligibility.
CFT = APR × 1.21 (for VAT) + monthly fees + insurance. Enter your loan details to see your true cost.

faq.q: What costs are included in the CFT calculation?
faq.a: APR, VAT on interest (21%), origination fees, insurance premiums, and all other finance charges.

sources.name: NIST — National Institute of Standards and Technology

dataUpdate.notes: Fixed formula, requires no external data updates
